summary: Completed testing of TripSync date range picker functionality. Backend API fully functional, frontend UI components verified with correct labels and structure.

ui_bugs.issue: Date buttons are disabled (showing past dates), preventing full interaction testing

integration_issues.issue: User sessions expire during testing, causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend API: User registration and login
Backend API: Submit preferences with date_ranges field
Backend API: Retrieve preferences with date ranges
Backend API: Availability heatmap with most_probable_ranges
Frontend UI: Date range picker component presence
Frontend UI: Correct label 'Select your travel dates'
Frontend UI: Navigation to preferences form
action_item_for_main_agent: Date range picker UI is functional but calendar shows past dates (disabled buttons). Consider updating calendar to show future dates by default for better user experience. Session management could be improved to prevent logouts during form completion.
